attempts.blocked_by: 9-nonce gap 1924-1932 (detected_missing_nonces from Hiro). Blocked confirmation until gap-fill in Phase C unblocks the chain.

expected_resolution: Phase C gap-fill of nonces 1924-1932 unblocks the chain → Day 2 (1933) confirms naturally with current fee. No RBF planned. Audit will record block_height + confirmed_at when observed.
note_on_chronological_inversion: Day 2 (this record) will confirm on chain BEFORE Day 1's retry, even though Day 1 was attempted first. This is an artifact of the recovery sequence — Day 2's broadcast at nonce 1933 already exists in mempool, gap-fill unblocks it before we re-broadcast Day 1 at nonce 1934+. The dates and amounts are correct; the wall-clock confirmation order is inverted. DC will be informed in the #634 comment (Phase G).
